title: Velvety Ethipian Nut Stir-Fry
description: A velvety ethiopian nut stir-fry featuring cranberry juice as a unique ingredient, perfect for a solo dinner or snack. This dish is nut-free-friendly and designed to be both tasty and nutritious.
instructions: Heat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion, garlic, and celery. Sauté until softened.
Stir in cranberry juice, cumin seed, coriander seed, turmeric powder, salt (as needed), and optional cranberry sauce.
Increase heat to high, bring mixture to a boil then reduce to medium-low and let simmer for about 10 minutes or until slightly thickened.
Add diced tomatoes and red pepper. Continue cooking for an additional 5-7 minutes until the tomato is softened and the sauce has reached your desired consistency.
Serve hot as a snack or side dish.
